---
title: "Anne Mozley"
---

## Anne Mozley

**Dates:** (1809-1891)

### Description

journalist and editor

### Biography

There is an obituary by CMY in <i>MP</i> (September 1891), 486.

### Letters

- Letter from [1891]
- Letter from [1869/70?]
- Letter from April 22nd 1861
- Letter from February 25, 1854.
- Letter from January 15, 1853.
- Letter from 20 October [1850]
- Letter from August 22, 1850
- Letter from October 29 [1849]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
